dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 9205 IH: Protect Every Preschooler Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Subramanyam (for himself, Ms. Norton, Mr. Moulton, Mr. Johnson of Georgia, Mrs. Hayes, Mr. Beyer, Mr. Frost, and Ms. Craig) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on the Judiciary

form.official-title: To expand the Gun Free School Zones Act, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Protect Every Preschooler Act of 2026.

section.header: Expansion of the Gun Free School Zones Act
section.text: Section 921(a)(27) of title 18, United States Code, is amended—

paragraph.text: by striking means a school which and inserting the following:
by striking the period at the end and inserting a semicolon; and
by adding at the end the following:

subparagraph.text: an early childhood education program (as defined in section 103 of the Higher Education Act of 1965 (20 U.S.C. 1003)); and
a preschool (which has the meaning given the term eligible preschool program in section 428K(g) of the Higher Education Act of 1965 (20 U.S.C. 1078–11(g))).
